purpose: Machine-readable overrides for confirmed or high-confidence false-positive conference-logo mappings found during repository audit.

policy.replacement_rule: Use the replacement_source_url only when it is a conference-owned logo/brand asset; otherwise leave the conference as no_logo_candidate until manual collection.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: ICWS
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Cross-conference reuse: ICWS was assigned the ICWSM asset. ICWS is International Conference on Web Services; ICWSM is International Conference on Web and Social Media.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: No repository-safe replacement binary committed in this pass; fetch from the ICWS official site before restoring a logo_file.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: AsiaCCS
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Cross-conference reuse: AsiaCCS was assigned the ACM CCS asset. The 2027 AsiaCCS page exposes ACM/SIGSAC/social images, not a distinct conference logo asset.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: Official conference page confirmed, but no distinct AsiaCCS logo asset was confirmed; do not replace with CCS.png, ACM.png, SIGSAC.png, or social icons.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: SoCC
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Cross-conference reuse: ACM SoCC was assigned Cloud.png, which belongs to the IEEE CLOUD entry because the description contains 'cloud computing'.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: Official SoCC 2026 page exposes a brand image at /assets/img/logo.png; binary replacement should use that asset.

confirmed_bad_mappings.title: ICIC
confirmed_bad_mappings.bad_reason: Cross-conference reuse: ICIC was assigned the ICICS asset. The acronyms differ by one trailing S and represent different conferences/domains.
confirmed_bad_mappings.replacement_confirmation: ICIC official page timed out during this pass; do not reuse ICICS.png.

high_confidence_manual_review.title: DFRWS
high_confidence_manual_review.risk_reason: Region-specific asset reused for another DFRWS edition: DFRWS EU 2026 currently maps to DFRWS APAC 2025. This may be acceptable only if the file is a generic DFRWS mark rather than an APAC-specific logo.
high_confidence_manual_review.recommended_action: Visually inspect and either rename to a generic DFRWS asset or mark no_logo_candidate for the EU edition.
